name: Gelatin Pizza
recipeIngredient: 2 package (8 servings) jello powder, any flavor
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 10 to 12
Pour gelatin into a bowl. Add 2 1/2 cups boiling water to the gelatin. Stir until the gelatin is completely dissolved, about 2 minutes. Spray a pizza pan with non-stick cooking spray. Pour the gelatin mixture into the pizza pan. Place the pan in the refrigerator to chill until firm, about 3 hours.
Remove the pan from the refrigerator when ready to serve. Put about 1 inch of warm water in the sink. Carefully dip just the bottom of the pan into warm water for 15 seconds. Spread whipped topping over the gelatin just before serving, leaving about 1 inch of space around the outside edge of the gelatin for the pizza "crust". Top the pizza with fruit, arranging the fruit in whatever design you like. Cut the pizza into wedges.
